name: Omega
description: Member of Shadow Garden, and one of the Numbers (No. 24). She is a subordinate of [Epsilon](https://anilist.co/character/162249). Omega is usually calm and collected but is troubled by her tendency to laugh at silly jokes.

name: Riko Izumi
description: Riko Izumi is a student in class 2-3 at CITY South High School and [Wako Izumi's](https://anilist.co/character/127010/Wako-Izumi) younger sister. She is often seen to be sleep-deprived and would often fall asleep whenever given the chance. Unbeknownst to her, she is able to capture the hearts of everyone who interacts with her in the city, even garnering a fan club composed of various city residents in an attempt to smooth out any potential conflict from anyone striving after their mutual crush.

name: Rivalz Cardemonde
nativeName: リヴァル・カルデモンド
description: Rivalz Cardemonde is one of Lelouch's friends, usually driving Lelouch around on his motorbike as an ante for their bets on chess games. He has a part-time job as a bartender/waiter and carries an unrequited love for Milly Ashford especially when it is announced that she is going through a marriage interview. Shown in-series and in the DVD-exclusive bonus material, Rivalz forms a fast friendship with Suzaku after he joins the student council at Lelouch's request. Rivalz's real surname is not Car

name: Ruggie Bucchi
description: A second-year student in Savanaclaw. Ruggie is a cheerful, mischievous boy with glutton tendencies. He is typically around with Leona, being his junior. His unique magic, Laugh With Me!, allows for Ruggie to control the movements of others, making them move as he does.
mediaTitles: Disney Twisted-Wonderland: The Manga – Book of Savanaclaw
searchTerms: Disney Twisted-Wonderland: The Manga – Book of Savanaclaw

name: Satan
description: Satan is the king of Gehenna. It has been said that he is the creator of every demon in existence. There is no body in Assiah powerful enough to host him because of his incredible powers.

name: Shougo Kiryuu
mediaTitles: One Week Friends Kaori no Nikki
searchTerms: One Week Friends Kaori no Nikki

name: Sister Gigant
description: Sister Gigant is very submissive and obedient, following orders without question and not protesting punishment. She is also melancholy, as she is often seen crying and lamenting certain events. However, despite following Lord Enorme without question, her true loyalty is to Venalita.

name: Steela
description: Her name is Steela, subtitle Franken Steela. Steela is a kind of Frankenstein-monster. She is very quiet and (almost?) never talks. She is the only person to befriend Rinne when Rinne tries to protect her from the teacher's beatings.

name: Suika Ibuki
description: Suika is the only oni currently living above ground in Gensokyo, with the remainder of the oni race living underground. Just as the folktales say, she has two horns on her head that symbolize her oni heritage, and enough physical strength to throw large boulders single-handedly. Her personality is jolly and quite childish as you would expect from her appearance. She also likes to drink and loves to party with all her heart. Her power in the games is to manipulate density. (Source: Touhou Wikia)
mediaTitles: Touhou Ibarakasen: Wild and Horned Hermit
Touhou Sangetsusei: Strange and Bright Nature Deity
The Lotus Eaters, Drunk and Sober

name: Suirei
description: Suirei is a court lady, doing menial tasks in the outer court.

name: Suzuka Asahina
description: A talented female high jumper from Yokohama that was scouted by many famous high schools because of her skill. While in Tokyo, she lives in Ayano’s dormitory, next door to Yamato. She is a serious athlete that puts a lot of pressure on herself to perform so she does not disappoint others. ~!At first, she has a cold attitude toward Yamato, but according to her sister, Suzuka only shows her arrogant and somewhat moody attitude to someone she likes. Because of her past with Kazuki, she was reluctan

name: Takeru Totsuka
description: Takeru is the Japanese god of the Sea and Storms. Short tempered and brash, he often gets into fights without realising it. He calls Yui "雑草, Zassou" (weed). Worships his elder brother Tsukito, but has a difficult relationship with Akira. Surprisingly, he can get emotional rather easily. Doesn't really get along well with anyone except Tsukito and Hades (whom he admires due to being the god of the underworld). He prides himself in swordplay and is very skilled in it. To calm down, he likes to ta

name: Tetsu Sendagaya
description: Tetsu Sendagaya is the Eve of Old Child, the Servamp of Pride. He works at a family-owned hot springs resort. Although he is only 14, he is often mistaken for a university student because of his great stature and muscular figure. He has blonde hair, with two blue clips on either side of his face, and blue eyes. His usually seen wearing white pants, a dark blue singlet, a white vest and a white and blue scarf with the hiragana for 'yu' (ゆ) on it. He is also usually seen carrying his lead, a large
mediaTitles: Servamp Movie: Alice in the Garden
searchTerms: Servamp Movie: Alice in the Garden

name: Tonpa
description: Examinee #16 during the Hunter exam. Tonpa is nicknamed the "Rookie Crusher" by other candidates with more experience taking the exam. Tonpa has taken the exam for 35 consecutive terms (given that the Hunter exam can only be taken by someone who is at least 12, it means that Tonpa either was lying, sneaked in the first two times, or that the age limit is a new rule), but has somehow never managed to pass. He often brags of his experience to those taking the Hunter Exam for the first time and the

name: Touka Yada
description: She is a student in Korosensei's Class 3-E. She is the big sister of Class 3-E and one of the most enthusiastic students about learning the art of infiltration from Irina. She's been described as being adult-like and cool to the point that Kayano admits that she's attracted to her despite her large bust. Yada does not like violence, which is why she commits herself to negotiation in order avoid fighting.

name: Toyoda
description: Friend to [Anna Anjou](https://anilist.co/character/129382/Anna-Anjou) and potential love interest to [Inuyama](https://anilist.co/character/181512/Inuyama). Cold and mean looking, but is actually kind and into cutesy things.

name: Trainer
description: Trainer of Team Spica.

name: Tsumugi
description: ~!Ancestor of molcars that saved time travelers from primitive people.!~

name: Van Fanel
description: Prince of Fanelia, pilot of Escaflowne, Van Fanel suddenly appears on Earth one day, fighting a Dragon. His life narrowly saved by Hitomi, a schoolgirl caught up in the battle, Van returns to his kingdom only for it to be torched to the ground a few days later. Van vows revenge on the perpetrators - the Zaibach Empire - even when he finds that Folken, his supposedly dead elder-brother, is working for them.
